paper.title: Evaluating chain-of-thought monitorability
paper.abstract: OpenAI introduces a new framework and evaluation suite for chain-of-thought monitorability, covering 13 evaluations across 24 environments. Our findings show that monitoring a model’s internal reasoning is far more effective than monitoring outputs alone, offering a promising path toward scalable control as AI systems grow more capable.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
